name: @search
description: O(1) symbol lookup via inverted index. Powers grep, egrep, multi-term search with ranking. Goal: sub-10ms response for any codebase symbol.

name: @indexer
description: Builds and maintains the inverted index from source files. Tokenization, symbol extraction, incremental updates. Foundation for instant search.

name: @cli
description: Shell command interface mirroring Unix grep/egrep conventions. Built from modular src/*.sh files via build.sh. Provides aoa grep, find, tree, domains.

name: @gateway
description: HTTP API routing requests to backend services. Provides /symbol, /multi, /files endpoints. Centralizes business logic server-side.

name: @redis
description: In-memory store for indexes, intent history, session state. Enables instant lookups and persistent learning. Critical for O(1) performance.

name: @intent
description: Captures developer behavior via hooks. Tracks exploration, edits, searches. Builds predictive model of needed files.

name: @hooks
description: Claude Code integration capturing tool calls without API keys. Enables learning by observing workflow. Zero-config codebase intelligence.

name: @domains
description: Semantic categorization by purpose, not location. Generated via analysis, stored as JSON, loaded to Redis. Enables @domain tags in results.

name: @jobs
description: Background task queue for long-running operations. Domain enrichment, batch processing. Queue/worker pattern for non-blocking execution.

name: @status
description: Real-time status line showing aOa activity. Intent count, tags, response time, focus. Ambient awareness of learning state.

name: @ranking
description: Scores and orders results by relevance. Term frequency, file recency, intent patterns. Most relevant result first.

name: @session
description: Parses Claude Code conversation history for context. Files mentioned, operations performed. Session-aware predictions.

name: @docker
description: Container deployment with docker-compose and monolithic modes. Both must produce identical behavior. Debugging vs simplicity.

name: @proxy
description: Git operations handler intercepting repository interactions. Tracks commits, branches, changes for enhanced context.

name: @config
description: Settings management via JSON files. Project and user-level configuration. Environment variables, installation parameters.

name: @skills
description: Reusable prompt templates for Claude Code. Setup wizards, domain generation, background tasks. Markdown with YAML frontmatter.

name: @analytics
description: Usage metrics and file heat maps. Frequently accessed files, search patterns. Informs prediction and ranking.

name: @prefetch
description: Proactive file loading based on intent patterns. Reduces latency by anticipating needs. Triggered by behavioral hooks.

name: @outline
description: Semantic file tagging for compressed context. Key symbols and structure extraction. Quick understanding without full reads.

name: @testing
description: Test infrastructure for aOa functionality. Simulation scripts, intent phase testing. Search and learning reliability.

name: @build
description: CLI assembly from modular shell scripts. build.sh concatenates src/*.sh into aoa executable. Organized development.

name: @install
description: First-time setup and onboarding. Creates directories, initializes config, starts services. Gets users productive quickly.

name: @health
description: Service monitoring and diagnostics. Redis, gateway, indexer availability checks. System status for troubleshooting.

name: @learner
description: ML integration improving predictions over time. Analyzes intent patterns to refine domains and recommendations.
